stemHtml: Which of the following statements about static lateral and directional stability is correct?

options.a: The effects of static lateral and static directional stability are completely independent of each other because they take place about different axes.
options.b: Static directional stability can be increased by installing more powerful engines.
options.c: An aeroplane with an excessive static directional stability in relation to its static lateral stability, will be prone to spiral dive (spiral instability).
options.d: An aeroplane with an excessive static directional stability in relation to its static lateral stability, will be prone to “Dutch roll”.
